title: An Introduction to Forensic Reconstruction of a Salesforce Security Incident
author: Eoghan Casey, Matt Potts

classification.rationale: Rule-based: learning intent detected in 'Introduction'. Products: platform. Funnel: awareness.

cta_health_issues: No CTA at the end of the article. Readers who finish are your highest-intent audience.
CTAs in 100% of sections. This is CTA spam — research shows it reduces engagement 15-20%.
